title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and collaboration in polymer extrusion, benefiting local manufacturing and research.

title: Suspect Arrested in Charlotte Grocery Store Stabbing
summary: A woman with an extensive criminal background has been arrested for stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Highlights public safety concerns and the impact of repeat offenders on the community.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman in Charlotte
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about the effectiveness of the justice system and public safety measures.

title: Braylon Clark Details Visit with Tennessee Football
summary: 2028 Charlotte Country Day (NC) wide-out Braylon Clark visits Knoxville for a football recruitment opportunity.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local talent and the importance of college recruitment for young athletes.

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
summary: Tips on selecting a reliable deck builder in Charlotte to enhance your home's outdoor living space and property value.
charlotte_impact: Provides valuable advice for homeowners looking to improve their property and quality of life.

title: Students Design Brand for Brown Museum
summary: Students design a brand for Charlotte Hawkins Brown's Canary Cottage, a 100-year-old museum in Guilford County, NC.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of preserving local history and engaging students in community projects.

title: FG Nexus CEO to Speak at FII Priority Miami 2026
summary: FG Nexus CEO Maja Vujinovic will co-chair the digital assets conclave and speak on a stablecoins panel at FII Priority Miami 2026.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's involvement in the digital assets industry and global financial discussions.

title: Voluntary Water Restrictions Begin in Charlotte
summary: Voluntary water restrictions are now in effect for Charlotte Water customers as drought conditions continue to worsen.
charlotte_impact: Addresses environmental concerns and the need for responsible water usage in the face of drought.

title: Lake Lure Reopens After Hurricane Helene
summary: Lake Lure begins a soft reopening more than a year after Hurricane Helene, marking a turning point for the community.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates community resilience and recovery efforts following a natural disaster.

title: Two Charged After Cocaine Found During Traffic Stop
summary: Two suspects are jailed after Gaston County deputies found over 30 pounds of cocaine and a hidden handgun during a traffic stop.
charlotte_impact: Highlights law enforcement efforts to combat drug trafficking and related crime.

title: One Shot, One Hit by Vehicle in University City
summary: One person was shot and another was hit by a vehicle on the 1700 block of Harris Houston Road in University City.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and violence in the University City area.

title: One Person Hurt in Shooting at Fort Mill Lounge
summary: A shooting at the Blue Olive Lounge in Fort Mill injured one person, according to investigators.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the issue of gun violence and its impact on local businesses and communities.

title: Lawmakers Push for Landslide Mapping After Helene Deaths
summary: Lawmakers are advocating for faster landslide mapping after deaths caused by Hurricane Helene, demanding action for western NC families.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the need for improved disaster preparedness and early warning systems.

title: Man Charged with Shooting Family Member
summary: Ronnie Corey Perry Jr., a convicted felon, is charged with shooting a family member, according to Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police.
charlotte_impact: Addresses domestic violence and the role of repeat offenders in violent crimes.

title: Four Hurt in West Charlotte Crash Involving Bus
summary: A crash on Freedom Drive in west Charlotte involving a bus resulted in injuries to four people, according to Medic.
